description: User asks about previously set or missed reminders.
examples: Did you remind me already?
What reminders do I have today?
Did I take my medicine?
Tell me my reminders for tomorrow
Show my past reminders

description: User inquires about recent health or checkup details.
examples: How was my blood pressure yesterday?
Show me my last checkup results
How am I doing lately?
Did I sleep well last night?
How was my sugar level yesterday?

description: User asks about past or recent communications.
examples: Did you call my son?
Who did I call last?
Who did I talk to earlier?
Did anyone message me today?
Who just called me?

description: User continues talking about their mood or asks about previous emotional check-ins.
examples: Did I tell you I was sad yesterday?
Was I feeling better last night?
Did you note how I felt yesterday?
How was my mood last time we talked?
Was I happier yesterday?

description: User refers to past or scheduled activities or routines.
examples: Did I do my walk yesterday?
Did I water the plants today?
Was I supposed to go for yoga?
Did I finish my reading session?
What did I do this morning?

description: User continues discussion about medication adherence or past doses.
examples: Did I take my pills yesterday?
When was my last medicine dose?
Did I skip any doses this week?
How many pills did I take yesterday?
Was I supposed to take insulin today?

description: User or caregiver checks on recent or resolved emergency events.
examples: What happened after my fall yesterday?
Did you alert the doctor last time?
Is the ambulance coming?
Was my last alert sent successfully?
Did my caregiver respond yesterday?

description: User continues conversation about a previous emotional crisis or distress.
examples: You remember what I told you yesterday?
I’m still feeling down since last night.
Did you tell anyone about how I felt?
You were helping me yesterday, right?
I still feel the same as before.

description: User refers to a previous conversation or event without a clear category — for general memory continuity.
examples: Did we talk about that yesterday?
What were we discussing last time?
You remember what I said earlier?
You told me something before, right?
Can you remind me what we talked about?
I think we discussed this yesterday.
Did we finish our chat from earlier?
What was I asking before?
You mentioned something last night.
Did we already talk about this?
